PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brett Gibbs for Maria Del Valle (Petitioner).

Mr. Gibbs presented a copy of the Proof of Service and the Declaration regarding the efforts to contact the children of the decedent. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.
